backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Client, Intervention, UserProfile, MediaItem) and CRUD methods for clients, interventions, user profiles, and media, with role-based access control via Auth mixin and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature fix for an unhandled initialization error that caused the app to crash before the login screen, linking it to affected files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PWA with French locale, viewport/theme meta tags, manifest and icon links, Apple mobile web app settings, and a root div mounting the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web manifest for 'Vial Traite Service' defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, and version 14.0.0.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker that caches PWA assets on install, serves non-navigation requests from cache with network fallback, always fetches navigation requests from the network, and cleans up old caches on activate.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with authenticated/unauthenticated route trees, QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and an AuthenticatedLayout that uses useEffect-based navigation instead of thrown redirects to avoid ErrorBoundary triggering.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUnloc: Empty file placeholder for the AdminUnlockDialog component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name on first login, blocking dismissal until a profile name is saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/blacklist/Blackl: Displays a panel for managing a client's blacklist status, allowing users to mark or unmark a client as blacklisted with optional comments and media attachments.
frontend/src/components/clients/CreateCl: A dialog form for creating a new client with fields for name, address, phone, and email, using the useCreateClient hook to persist the data.
frontend/src/components/clients/EditClie: A dialog form pre-populated with existing client data that allows editing client details such as name, address, phone, and email via the useUpdateClient hook.
A wrapper around the Badge UI component that adds custom color variants for 'success', 'warning', and 'pending' states.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: A React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and displays a styled error card with options to retry, reload, or copy error details to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/export/ExportDat: A dialog that lets users export application data in either JSON or PDF format, showing a progress bar while the export is in progress.
frontend/src/components/guards/Authentic: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and shows a loading spinner while authentication state is being initialized.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ad: A dialog component for creating a new intervention, with date fields (day/month/year), a comments textarea, and a media picker, using the useAddIntervention mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ed: A dialog component for editing an existing intervention, pre-populating fields from the provided intervention object and submitting updates via the useUpdateIntervention mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/In: A read-only dialog displaying intervention details (date, employee, comments, media) with an optional edit button that opens the EditInterventionDialog for authorized users.
Displays a list of interventions for a given client with add, edit, delete, and view actions, handling loading/error states and confirmation dialogs for deletion.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileLay: A mobile app shell with a sticky header (logo, user name, logout), a scrollable main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with links to Clients, Dashboard, and Technical Folder pages.
frontend/src/components/media/FilePicker: A simple button component that programmatically opens a file input dialog and returns the selected files via an onSelect callback.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPicke: A media management component that allows users to add media via file upload or camera capture (using a CameraDialog sub-component) and displays thumbnails with remove buttons for each selected item.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPrevi: Renders a grid of image thumbnails from ExternalBlob objects, loading them via direct URL or object URL, and opens a DocumentViewer dialog when a thumbnail is clicked.
frontend/src/components/sync/Connectivit: Displays a status bar showing offline state or pending sync operations count, with a button to manually trigger synchronization when online.
frontend/src/components/technical-folder: Modal dialog for creating a new folder at a given path, validating the folder name and calling the useCreateFolder mutation on submit.
Modal viewer for files (images, PDFs, videos) with zoom, rotation, fullscreen, pinch-to-zoom, and download support based on file extension.
Returns an appropriate Lucide icon component based on a file's extension, covering images, PDFs, videos, Word, and spreadsheet formats.
Modal dialog for moving a file to a different folder, providing breadcrumb navigation through the existing folder structure and calling the move mutation on confirm.
Modal dialog for renaming a folder, validating the new name and calling the useRenameFolder mutation on submit.
Renders a single file row with view, move, and delete actions, integrating DocumentViewer, MoveFolderDialog, and a delete confirmation AlertDialog.
A dialog component for uploading files to a technical folder, supporting both file selection and camera capture with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance, using the current Internet Identity for authentication and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUnlock.ts: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlacklist.ts: Provides two mutation hooks to mark or unmark a client as blacklisted via the backend actor, with toast notifications and query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClients.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all clients, fetching a single client by ID, creating a client, and updating a client via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Provides hooks to fetch the current caller's user profile and to save/update it via the backend actor, with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useDataExport.ts: A hook that fetches all clients, interventions, and technical files from the backend and exports the aggregated data as a JSON or plain-text file download with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useInterventions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting client interventions via the backend actor, with toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: A simple hook that tracks and returns the browser's online/offline status by listening to window network events.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: Custom React hook that tracks online status and pending sync count, automatically triggering a sync operation when the device comes back online with pending items.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalFolder.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for managing a technical file folder, providing CRUD operations (list, upload, delete, move, create folder, rename folder) against the backend actor with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the Vial Traite Service brand color theme in both light and dark modes, plus safe-area inset utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a single `cn` helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/offline/db.ts: IndexedDB abstraction layer that initializes a database with 'outbox' and 'cache' stores, exposing helpers to add/get/remove outbox operations and cache arbitrary data with graceful fallback if IndexedDB is unavailable.
frontend/src/offline/outbox.ts: Separate IndexedDB-backed outbox module for queuing offline operations, providing enqueue, getAll, and remove functions with a timestamp index.
frontend/src/offline/syncEngine.ts: Sync engine that reads queued offline operations and replays them against the backend actor, removing successfully processed operations and handling unauthorized errors gracefully.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDossierPage.tsx: Page component displaying a single client's full dossier including contact info, blacklist status, intervention list, and an edit dialog, with loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Page component listing all clients with a search filter, blacklist badges, navigation to individual dossiers, and a dialog to create new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a calendar and a list of interventions for the selected date, with loading/error states and a details dialog on item click.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the home route once authenticated and handling edge cases like already-authenticated sessions.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalFolderPage.t: Technical folder page that renders a navigable file/folder tree built from flat file paths, with support for uploading files, creating folders, and renaming folders.
frontend/src/pwa/registerServiceWorker.t: Registers the PWA service worker (/sw.js) after a short delay on page load, with basic error logging.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, font stack, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Vial Traite Service' tracking existing features (crash fix before login screen) and a pending request to add defensive error handling during app bootstrap.
